changes.summary: Added Feb 28, 2026 monthly data point from SC TO-I tender offer filing.
changes.detail: SC TO-I (accession 0001398344-26-007391, filed 2026-04-28) disclosed Feb 28, 2026 NAV per Class I Unit of $1.8426 (Class A $1.8378, Class S $1.8333, Class M $1.8426) and total fund net asset value of $257,823,417.12 (~$258M). Previous latest data point was Dec 31, 2025 (NPORT-P AUM $227.5M). NAV change from Sep 30, 2025 ($1.79) to Feb 28, 2026 ($1.8426) = +2.93%.
